name: The First Rune
description: You have logged your first tome in the Grand Library. Every legend begins with a single word — yours has begun.
hintText: Log your first book to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Blade of Ten Sagas
description: Ten tomes lie conquered at your feet. The scribes of the ancient order have inscribed your name in the Hall of Readers. You are no longer a novice.
hintText: Read 10 books to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Dragon's Hoard
description: Fifty volumes of lore and legend — a hoard worthy of the greatest dragon. You have consumed more knowledge than most warriors see in a lifetime.
hintText: Read 50 books to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Quest Begins
description: You have completed your first quest and proven yourself worthy of the adventurer's path. The ancient order takes notice — a new champion stirs.
hintText: Complete your first quest to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Oath of Fellowship
description: No warrior walks alone. You have found your first companion on the road of reading and sworn the oath of fellowship. Together, your legends will be greater.
hintText: Add your first friend to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Centurion of Scrolls
description: One hundred tomes! The great library itself trembles at your dedication. You have earned the title of Centurion of Scrolls — a warrior of unmatched literary prowess.
hintText: Read 100 books to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Loremaster's Breadth
description: You have explored five distinct realms of literature. From the darkest horror to the brightest fantasy, you have walked them all. The Loremaster's seal is yours.
hintText: Read books from 5 different genres to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Unbroken Vigil
description: For three consecutive moons you have not let the flame of reading die. The bard Thalindor sings of your dedication in every tavern from here to the Frozen Peaks.
hintText: Complete a book every month for 3 consecutive months to unlock this mark of glory.

name: The Oath Fulfilled
description: You swore an oath to read, and you have kept it. The gods of the ancient library smile upon you. Your word is your bond, and your bond is iron.
hintText: Complete a reading goal to unlock this mark of glory.
